name: SPR-4A "Fabricator"
description: The Fabricator is the apex ship-specific printer, employing plasma vapor nanoscale deposition to build components atom-layer by atom-layer in a large magnetically-confined deposition cell. Each feedstock element is independently vaporised, ionised, and directed to the growing workpiece; composition gradients inaccessible to any other manufacturing route can be programmed on a 10 nm scale. The result is thruster nozzles with graded thermal resistance walls, reactor cladding with tungsten-carbide gradients, and generator windings with zero crystal boundary losses. At 750 kg/hr the Fabricator out-produces any earlier ship printer and can sustain output indefinitely from smelted local feedstock.
